query: SELECT p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, p.email, p.userId, p.status, u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.openId, u.role FROM patients p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id WHERE p.firstName LIKE '%Samantha%' OR p.lastName LIKE '%Buker%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT p.id, p.firstName, p.lastName, p.email, p.userId, p.status, u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.openId, u.role FROM patients p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id WHERE p.firstName LIKE '%Samantha%' OR p.lastName LIKE '%Buker%';
